name: add_qor_checks
short_description: Add a QoR Check to a ruledeck
full_help:
add_qor_checks

Description: 
Add a QoR Check to a ruledeck

Syntax: 
add_qor_checks  -ruledeck <arg> [-quiet] [-verbose] [<IDs>]

Returns: 
Add a QoR check to a ruledeck

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  -ruledeck   Ruledeck to add to
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution
  [<IDs>]     Match suggestion names against given IDs

Categories: 
Netlist, Project

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
